case_title: ROBERT JOHN NAYLOR VS. PHILCO CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAYLOR, ROBERT JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT PHILCO CONSTRUCTION, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
